rqs: What is the time and space complexity of QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, and Radix Sort compared to Insertion Sort, Bubble Sort, and Selection Sort in academic journals and conference proceedings?
Which sorting algorithms (QuickSort, MergeSort, HeapSort, Radix Sort) demonstrate stability and scalability in open source repositories and benchmark suites?
In what scenarios do parallel sorting techniques outperform traditional sorts regarding throughput and scalability for high‑performance computing and embedded systems?
base_query: ("Software Developers" OR "Algorithm Researchers" OR "Data Processing Systems" OR "Embedded Systems" OR "High Performance Computing" OR "researcher") AND ("QuickSort" OR "MergeSort" OR "HeapSort" OR "Radix Sort" OR "Parallel Sorting") AND ("Insertion Sort" OR "Bubble Sort" OR "Selection Sort" OR "Shell Sort" OR "TimSort") AND ("Time Complexity" OR "Space Complexity" OR "Stability" OR "Scalability" OR "Throughput") AND ("Academic Journals" OR "Conference Proceedings" OR "Open Source Repositories" OR "Benchmark Suites" OR "Industry Reports")
arxiv_query: (all:"Software Developers" OR all:"Algorithm Researchers" OR all:"Data Processing Systems" OR all:"Embedded Systems" OR all:"High Performance Computing" OR all:"researcher") AND (all:"QuickSort" OR all:"MergeSort" OR all:"HeapSort" OR all:"Radix Sort" OR all:"Parallel Sorting") AND (all:"Insertion Sort" OR all:"Bubble Sort" OR all:"Selection Sort" OR all:"Shell Sort" OR all:"TimSort") AND (all:"Time Complexity" OR all:"Space Complexity" OR all:"Stability" OR all:"Scalability" OR all:"Throughput") AND (all:"Academic Journals" OR all:"Conference Proceedings" OR all:"Open Source Repositories" OR all:"Benchmark Suites" OR all:"Industry Reports")

questions.text: Does the study clearly describe the algorithm implementations and experimental setup?
Are performance metrics (time, space, scalability) measured using standard benchmarks?
Is the source code or pseudocode provided to enable reproducibility?
Does the paper discuss limitations and threats to validity of the results?
Is the study context (e.g., HPC, embedded) relevant to the defined PICOC population?
